question: Which 12K 5u lens has the least warping at the edges?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, tv_distortion_percent FROM line_scan_lens_12k5u ORDER BY ABS(tv_distortion_percent) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Show all 16K 5u lenses with their price and weight
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, list_price, weight_g FROM line_scan_lens_16k5u;
focus: Simple retrieval. Correct table selection from resolution+pitch.

question: What is the heaviest 8K 7u line scan lens?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, weight_g FROM line_scan_lens_8k7u WHERE weight_g IS NOT NULL ORDER BY weight_g DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Compare the maximum aperture of the old 4K 7 micron lenses with the new series.
expected_sql: SELECT 'original' AS series, model_name, f_no_min FROM line_scan_lens_4k7u UNION ALL SELECT 'new_series' AS series, model_name, f_no_min FROM new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u ORDER BY f_no_min;

question: What is the cheapest FA lens?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, list_price FROM fa_lenses WHERE list_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY list_price ASC LIMIT 1;
focus: Product type routing to fa_lenses. Superlative pattern.

question: Show FA lenses with focal length over 50mm
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, focus_length_mm FROM fa_lenses WHERE focus_length_mm > 50;

question: Which FA lens has the widest aperture?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, f_no_min FROM fa_lenses WHERE f_no_min IS NOT NULL ORDER BY f_no_min ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Show all non-standard telecentric lenses with working distance over 100mm
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, wd_mm FROM non_standard_telecentric_lenses WHERE wd_mm > 100;
focus: Telecentric routing. Numeric filter on wd_mm.

question: What is the most expensive telecentric lens for 65 megapixel sensors?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, list_price FROM telecentric_lenses_65mp WHERE list_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY list_price DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which standard 2/3 inch telecentric lenses have distortion below 0.05%?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, tv_distortion_percent FROM standard_telecentric_lenses_2_3_inch WHERE ABS(tv_distortion_percent) < 0.05;

question: List all macro lenses with maximum magnification above 2x
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, magnification_max FROM macro_lenses WHERE magnification_max > 2;

question: What is the lightest macro lens?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, weight_g FROM macro_lenses WHERE weight_g IS NOT NULL ORDER BY weight_g ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Show all zoom lenses with their magnification range
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, magnification_min, magnification_max FROM zoom_lenses;
focus: Zoom routing. Retrieval of min/max magnification.

question: Which zoom lenses are motorized?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, zoom_type FROM zoom_lenses WHERE zoom_type ILIKE '%motorized%';
focus: Text filter on zoom_type using ILIKE.

question: Show all spectral lenses that work above 1000nm wavelength
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, wavelength_min_nm, wavelength_max_nm FROM spectral_lenses WHERE wavelength_max_nm > 1000;

question: What is the cheapest spectral lens?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, list_price FROM spectral_lenses WHERE list_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY list_price ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the lightest M12 mount lens?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, weight_g FROM m12_mount_lenses WHERE weight_g IS NOT NULL ORDER BY weight_g ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Show M12 lenses with megapixel rating above 5
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, megapixel_rating FROM m12_mount_lenses WHERE megapixel_rating > 5;

question: Which microscope lens has the highest magnification?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, magnification_max FROM microscope_lenses WHERE magnification_max IS NOT NULL ORDER BY magnification_max DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Show microscope lenses with numerical aperture above 0.3
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, numerical_aperture FROM microscope_lenses WHERE numerical_aperture > 0.3;

question: What is the cheapest large format lens?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, list_price FROM large_format_lenses WHERE list_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY list_price ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Show all available adapters with their mount types
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, mount_primary_raw, mount_secondary_raw FROM adapters;

question: What is the cheapest 360 inspection system?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, list_price FROM inspection_360_systems WHERE list_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY list_price ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Show all anti-vibration lenses with their price and focal length
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, list_price, focus_length_mm FROM anti_vibration_lenses;

question: Which autofocus lens has the fastest response time?
expected_sql: SELECT model_name, response_time_ms FROM autofocus_lenses WHERE response_time_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY response_time_ms ASC LIMIT 1;
